execute_steps: npx vitest run test/extension-resolver.test.ts --reporter=verbose

assert resolve > integrates all sources and deduplicates test passes
test_execution.evidence: vitest: ✓ npm overrides bundled for same name, ✓ higher priority source wins

verify rpc-client receives paths via spawn args without file suffix
